mapper.sql: t.id, t.job_id, t.glue_type, t.glue_source, t.glue_remark, t.add_time, t.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO glue_log ( job_id, glue_type, glue_source, glue_remark, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{glueType}, #{glueSource}, #{glueRemark}, #{addTime}, #{updateTime} );
mapper.select: SELECT FROM glue_log AS t WHERE t.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY id DESC
